plugins.name: IP Lookup
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Look up any IP address and get back its city, country, ISP, and ASN. No API key needed. Usage: /iplookup <address>

plugins.name: Auto Responder
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Automatically reply to Chat messages that match keyword patterns you define. Set up triggers and responses with /respond, list them with /responses.

plugins.name: Prompt Generator
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Generate precision-crafted AI prompts using proven formulas (AIDA, SCQA, PASTOR, CoT, ToT, PAS). Commands: /promptlab, /promptgen <task>, /formula <name> <task>.

plugins.name: BMAD Agent Personas
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Activates the full BMAD AI persona suite: John (PM), Sally (UX), Winston (Architect), Amelia (Dev), Paige (Writer), Mary (Analyst). Switch with /john, /sally, etc.

plugins.name: System Monitor
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Live system stats without leaving the terminal. CPU load, RAM usage, disk space, uptime, and running processes. Commands: /sysmon /cpu /ram /disk /uptime /procs.

plugins.name: Git Operations
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Short-hand git commands for the daily workflow. Status, diff, log, commit, push, branch, stash, and reset — all sanitized and safe. Commands: /gs /gd /gl /gc /gp /gf /gb /gco /gst /greset /gchanged.

plugins.name: Developer Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Miscellaneous dev utilities: open ports, which binary, env vars, PATH, running processes, kill by name, Node.js info, and tool version inventory. Commands: /ports /port /which /env /path /running /kill /node /versions.

plugins.name: Quick Notes
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: A persistent scratchpad that lives in your terminal. Add notes, list them, search by keyword, and delete by ID. Data survives app restarts. Commands: /note /notes /delnote /clearnotes /searchnotes.

plugins.name: Time Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Time utilities for developers: current time in any timezone, Unix timestamps, UTC clock, age calculator, ISO week number, moon phase, and a built-in Pomodoro timer. Commands: /now /ts /utc /date /tzlist /age /pomodoro /week.

plugins.name: Crypto Utilities
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Hashing, encoding, and secret generation without leaving the terminal. SHA-256, MD5, Base64 encode/decode, UUID v4, random password generator, and secure hex tokens. Commands: /hash /b64enc /b64dec /uuid /pwgen /token.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Current weather, 3-day forecast, moon phase, and temperature unit conversion via wttr.in. No API key required. Commands: /weather /forecast /moon /temp.

plugins.name: Code Snippets
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: A persistent code snippet library inside the terminal. Save named snippets, list them, search by keyword, copy to clipboard, and delete. Survives app restarts. Commands: /snip /addsnip /snips /delsnip /copysnip.

plugins.name: AI Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: One-shot AI workflow shortcuts that send your text to the active LLM and return the result inline. Summarize, explain, ELI5, improve, review code, translate, bullet-point, debug, generate docstrings, write regexes, suggest names. Commands: /summarize /explain /eli5 /improve /review /translate /bullet /debug /docstring /regex /naming.

plugins.name: Network Checker
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Network diagnostics without leaving the terminal. Ping, public IP, DNS lookup, HTTP status check, port connectivity, traceroute, and IP geolocation. Commands: /ping /myip /dns /curl /nc /tracert /ipinfo.

plugins.name: Steam Deck Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Steam Deck hardware controls and status from the terminal. Battery level, TDP limit, performance governor, FPS cap, VRAM, and Game Mode detection. Commands: /deck /battery /tdp /perf /fps /vram /gamemode.

plugins.name: File Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: File system utilities for the terminal: find files, directory tree, list with details, folder sizes, recently modified files, file hash (SHA-256), and diff two files. Commands: /find /tree /ls /size /recent /hashfile /diff.

plugins.name: Command Aliases
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Create short aliases for any NEURODECK command and have them persist across app restarts. Type /alias gs git status to make /gs run /git status. Commands: /alias /aliases /unalias.

plugins.name: Developer Journal
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: A persistent dev journal with auto-logging. Prefix any chat message with LOG: and it auto-saves. Browse by date, search entries, view stats. Commands: /log /journal /jtoday /searchlog /jstats /clearlog.

plugins.name: System Events & Security Watch
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Passive security monitor that watches every message for dangerous patterns (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, curl|bash, plaintext secrets) and warns you before you run them. Also tracks session command usage stats. Commands: /stats /watch.

plugins.name: Docker Toolkit
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: The most common Docker operations as short terminal commands. Running containers, logs, start/stop/restart, exec, image management, prune, stats, inspect, and docker-compose shortcuts. Commands: /dps /dpsa /dlogs /dstart /dstop /drestart /dexec /dimages /drm /drmi /dclean /dstats /dinspect /dcompose.

plugins.name: Code Runner
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Execute code snippets in popular languages directly from chat. Python, Node.js, Shell, Lua (in-runtime), and Rust — paste and run without leaving NEURODECK. Commands: /py /js /sh /lua /rs /eval /repl.

plugins.name: Sprint & Task Tracker
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: A lightweight sprint board inside the terminal. Add tasks with priority levels, move them through todo/doing/done/blocked, and track velocity — persisted as plain text. No Jira needed. Commands: /task /tasks /doing /done /blocked /deltask /velocity.

plugins.name: Calculator
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Safe math evaluator with unit and base conversions — all inside the terminal. Supports arithmetic, unit conversion (km/mi, kg/lb, C/F, etc.), hex/binary conversions. Commands: /calc /convert /hex /bin.

plugins.name: Clipboard Manager
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Persistent clipboard history — save text snippets, browse the last 50 entries, search, copy to system clipboard, and delete. Survives restarts. Commands: /clip /clips /copyclip /delclip /clearclips /searchclips.

plugins.name: Package Manager Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Unified shortcuts for npm, pip, cargo, pacman, and apt — the most common package managers in one place. Auto-detects what's installed. Commands: /npm /pip /cargo /pac /apt /pkginfo.

plugins.name: RSS Reader
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Fetch and browse RSS/Atom feeds in the terminal. Includes Hacker News and LWN.net by default. Add custom feeds, browse by number, and read headlines without leaving NEURODECK. Commands: /rss /addfeed /feeds /delfeed.

plugins.name: URL Bookmarks
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Save, tag, search, and open URLs directly from the terminal. Persistent across restarts, with tag-based organisation. Commands: /bm /bms /delbm /searchbm /openbm /tagbm.

plugins.name: Document Templates
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Ready-to-use templates for PRs, standups, bug reports, commit messages, READMEs, and API docs. Add custom templates and call them by name. Commands: /tpl /tpls /addtpl /deltpl.

plugins.name: Screen Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Screenshot, screen recording, display info, and brightness control — Steam Deck, Linux, and Windows. Detects platform automatically. Commands: /screenshot /record /stoprecord /displays /brightness.

plugins.name: Webhook Receiver
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Quick local HTTP webhook listener for testing integrations — no external tools needed. Start a listener on any port, log incoming requests, and get the LAN URL instantly. Commands: /webhook /webhookstop /webhooklogs /webhookurl.

plugins.name: AI Translator
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Translate text into 25 languages using the active LLM — no external API key needed. Supports language detection and short /tl alias. Commands: /translate /tl /detect /languages.

plugins.name: Database Tools
plugins.author: khaoticdev62
plugins.description: Quick SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL shortcuts — connect, query, inspect schema, list tables, and export. Uses system binaries (sqlite3/psql/mysql). Commands: /sqlite /dbtables /dbschema /dbexport /psql /mysql.
